backend/main.mo: Actor implementing authorization, user profiles, portfolio CRUD, and booking management with admin checks and category constraints.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking feature IDs to affected frontend files and components with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries describing key frontend files and their functionality across styling, routing, pages, and components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining light/dark OKLCH color variables and global background/foreground rules.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes for public pages and admin dashboard within a themed layout and toaster.
Route guard checking authentication and admin status, rendering alerts or protected content accordingly.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Auth button handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal for first-time profile creation with validation and profile-saving mutation.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Layout wrapper rendering header, main content, and footer around all pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Renders the site footer with contact links, branding, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Implements a responsive site header with navigation, authentication controls, and an admin-only dashboard link.
frontend/src/constants/contactInfo.ts: Defines static contact info including email and Instagram details.
frontend/src/constants/photographyOption: Exports photography categories and session types with associated TypeScript value types.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor instance tied to the user's identity and refreshes dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and logic for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains React Query hooks for portfolio items, user profiles, admin checks, and booking request operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and a custom color theme with light and dark mode support.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Displays a confirmation page outlining next steps after a booking request is submitted.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Implements a booking request form for clients to submit session details and contact info, validating inputs and sending data via a createBooking mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard/BookingDeta: Displays detailed booking information with actions for accepting, denying, confirming, setting price, and updating payment status.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard/BookingsLis: Fetches and categorizes all booking requests, rendering them in tabbed lists with summary cards and navigation to detail pages.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard/DashboardHo: Shows dashboard stats for bookings and prompts profile setup if needed, with quick links to core management sections.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard/PortfolioMa: Provides CRUD management for portfolio items including creation, editing, and deletion through dialogs and form handling.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page showing a hero section, feature highlights, and a small featured portfolio preview using fetched items.
frontend/src/pages/PortfolioDetailPage.t: Displays a single portfolio item with metadata, image, and navigation, handling loading and not-found states.
Renders a full gallery grid of all portfolio items with hover overlays and loading fallback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hash routing, and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, typography, animations, shadows, and plugins for the project.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing scope, features, architectural notes, and versioned state for the photography app.
